title: 2026 Huntress Cyber Threat Report released
summary: Huntress published its annual Cyber Threat Report covering trends across the SMB MDR landscape — top adversary tradecraft, dwell times, and the techniques that move first when initial access succeeds.
why_it_matters: Gives Technijian's analysts a fresh evidence base to tune detections and ensures your MDR coverage tracks the threats actually being seen in the wild this year.

title: Continuous platform improvements
summary: Huntress shipped its usual cadence of detection-rule updates, agent version bumps, and false-positive reductions during February. These ride along with the agent automatically — no client-side action needed.
why_it_matters: Detection content stays current without any maintenance effort on your team's part. Agent updates roll out silently in the background.
